x-component.description: Aligns sentences within text units (paragraphs). Produces sentence alignments as bilingual text units or a TMX file.

tmxOutputPath.description: Full path of the output TMX file
tmxOutputPath.title: TMX output path

generateTMX.description: If generateTMX is false generate bilingual TextUnits, otherwise (true) output a TMX file
generateTMX.title: Generate the following TMX document:

segmentSource.title: Segment Source Content
segmentSource.description: Segment the source content before alignment, overriding any existing segmentation

useCustomSourceRules.title: Custom Source Segmentation Rules
useCustomSourceRules.description: Use a custom SRX file for source segmentation instead of the built-in default rules

customSourceRulesPath.description: Full path of the SRX document to use for the source
customSourceRulesPath.title: SRX path for the source

segmentTarget.title: Segment Target Content
segmentTarget.description: Segment the target content before alignment, overriding any existing segmentation

useCustomTargetRules.title: Custom Target Segmentation Rules
useCustomTargetRules.description: Use a custom SRX file for target segmentation instead of the built-in default rules

customTargetRulesPath.description: Full path of the SRX document to use for the target
customTargetRulesPath.title: SRX path for the target

collapseWhitespace.description: Collapse whitespace (space, newline etc.) to a single space before segmentation and alignment
collapseWhitespace.title: Collapse whitspace

forceSimpleOneToOneAlignment.description: If the number of sentences are the same then align one to one. Otherwise collapse the sentences and align
forceSimpleOneToOneAlignment.title: Force Simple One to One Alignment
